knowledge.html:
XI. PHRASES & CLAUSES (CỤM TỪ & MỆNH ĐỀ)

1. Cụm từ và mệnh đề chỉ sự tương phản (although / in spite of)

Cụm từ chỉ sự tương phản (mặc dù)Mệnh đề chỉ sự tương phản (mặc dù)
In spite of / Despite + Danh từ / Ngu danh từ / V-ingAlthough / Even though / Though + S + V
Despite the fact that
In spite of the fact that
Ex: Despite his laziness, he passed the exam.
Ex: Although he was lazy, he passed the exam.

2. Cụm từ và mệnh đề chỉ lý do (because / because of...)

Cụm từ chỉ lý doMệnh đề chỉ lý do
Because of / Due to / Owing to + Danh từ / Ngu danh từ / V-ingBecause / As / Since + S + V, S + V
due to the fact that
owing to the fact that

3. Cụm từ và mệnh đề chỉ mục đích (in order to / so that...)

Cụm từ chỉ mục đíchMệnh đề chỉ mục đích
(in order (not) to / so as (not) to) + V1so that + S + will/would/can/could/may/might + V1
in order that + S + can/could + V1

Lưu ý: Sau "want, hope" có tân ngữ -> đếm tân ngữ làm chu từ cho mệnh đề 2.

Ex: He gave me his address. He wanted me to contact him.
=> He gave me his address so that I could contact him.

4. Cụm từ và mệnh đề chỉ kết quả

a. too...to / enough

too...to: qua...không thế
S + V + too + adj/adv + to V
S + V + too + adj + for O + to V

enough: du...để
S + be + adj + enough + (for O) + to V1
S + V + enough + N + (for O) + to V1

b. so...that / such...that

so...that:
S + V + so + adj/adv + that + S + V
S + V + so + adj + a + N(ít) + that + S + V
S + V + so + many/few + N(nhiều) + that + S + V
S + V + so + much/little + N(kdd) + that + S + V

such...that:
S + V + such + a/an + adj + N(ít) + that + S + V
S + V + such + adj + N(nhiều) + that + S + V
S + V + such + adj + N(kdd) + that + S + V

Dao ngu với "so"

S1 + V + so + adj/adv + that + S + V
<=> So + adj/adv + V + S1 + that + S + V

Mac du (concession):

- Adj/adv + as/though + S + V
- However + Adj/Adv + S + V
- No matter Wh- + ADJ + S + V (no matter what/how/when/where = whatever/however)
- Despite = in spite of + NP
- Although/though/even though + Clause

5. Clauses of manner (md chỉ thể cách): AS IF & AS THOUGH

Tinh huongCông thứcVí dụ
Dieu không có thật ở hiện tạiS + V + as if/as though + S + V2/Ved
(dùng 'were' cho tất cả)		She dresses as if she was/were an actress.
Dieu không có thật ở quá khứS + Vqk + as if/as though + S + had + V3/vedHe talked about New York as though he had been there before.

*Would rather

Tinh huongCông thứcVí dụ
Giả thiết ở HT hoặc TLS1 + would rather that + S2 + V2/edMary would rather that her husband worked in the same office as she does.
Giả thiết ở Qua KhuS1 + would rather that + S2 + had + V3/V-edShe would rather that her husband had gone to the office yesterday.

exercises.question: Did you like the band last night? Yes, _____ I bought their record.
exercises.explanation: 'so much that' = nhiều den muc mà... Cấu trúc: so + adv + that.

exercises.question: That's a beautiful dress jean has on. She always wears _____ clothes.
exercises.explanation: 'such + adj + N(số nhiều)' => 'such lovely clothes'.

exercises.question: Jill and Jolly were happy _____ it was their both birthday party that day.
exercises.explanation: Can mệnh đề chỉ lý do (S + V) => 'because'.

exercises.question: Nobody could hear her _____ she spoke too quietly.
exercises.explanation: Theo sau là mệnh đề (S + V) chỉ lý do => 'because'.

exercises.question: Paul is a very competent salesperson. He's _____ good that I ấm going to give him a raise and a promotion.
exercises.explanation: 'so + adj + that' => 'so good that...'.

exercises.question: A tree had fallen during the storm, _____ the road was blocked and we couldn't go anywhere.
exercises.explanation: 'so that' ở đây chỉ kết quả (= và vì vậy): cay do => duong bi chan. Phan biet: 'so that' chỉ mục đích thường di với can/could/would, còn 'so that' chỉ kết quả thường diễn tả hậu quả tự nhiên.

exercises.question: There has been a reduction in the oil supply and increased demand, _____ price has risen.
exercises.explanation: 'so' nói kết quả: nguon cũng giam + câu tang => giá tang.

exercises.question: _____ he has a headache, he has to take an aspirin.
exercises.explanation: Ly do (bi đầu đầu) => kết quả (phải uong thuoc) => 'Because'.

exercises.question: _____ he always did well on his English tests, his parents were not surprised that he got an B level.
exercises.explanation: 'Since' = vì (chỉ lý do). Anh ta luôn làm tốt => bỏ me không ngac nhien.

exercises.question: Our visit to Japan was delayed _____ my wife's illness.
exercises.explanation: Sau cho trong là danh từ ('my wife's illness') => 'because of'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Although our grandfather was old but he could help us.
exercises.correctSentence: Although our grandfather was old, he could help us.
exercises.explanation: 'Although' và 'but' không dùng cũng nhau. Bo 'but'.

exercises.wrongSentence: My friends advised her to stop doing the housework because her old age.
exercises.correctSentence: My friends advised her to stop doing the housework because of her old age.
exercises.explanation: Sau 'because' can mệnh đề (S+V). Truoc danh từ phải dùng 'because of'.

exercises.wrongSentence: He tried to explain, so she refused to listen.
exercises.correctSentence: He tried to explain, but she refused to listen.
exercises.explanation: Hai mệnh đề tương phản nhau (có giải thích nhưng từ chối nghe) => dùng 'but'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Despite of growing industrial activity, the majority of the American people continued to make their living from farming until the beginning of the twentieth century.
exercises.correctSentence: Despite growing industrial activity, the majority of the American people continued to make their living from farming until the beginning of the twentieth century.
exercises.explanation: 'Despite' không di với 'of'. Chi có 'In spite of' moi có 'of'.

exercises.wrongSentence: She turned down the radio so as to disturb the neighbors.
exercises.correctSentence: She turned down the radio so as not to disturb the neighbors.
exercises.explanation: Vat ấm thành nho lai để KHONG làm phiền hàng xóm => 'so as not to'.

exercises.original: The kind of milk is so bad that the child can't drink ít more.
exercises.answer: The kind of milk is too bad for the child to drink.
exercises.explanation: so + adj + that S + can't => too + adj + for O + to V.

exercises.original: The food was so good that we ate all of ít.
exercises.answer: It was such good food that we ate all of ít.
exercises.explanation: so + adj => such + adj + N.

exercises.original: The patient was too weak to get up.
exercises.answer: The patient was so weak that he/she couldn't get up.
exercises.explanation: too + adj + to V => so + adj + that + S + can't/couldn't + V.

exercises.original: This room is too dark for me to study.
exercises.answer: This room is not bright enough for me to study.
exercises.explanation: too + adj (negative) => not + adj (opposite) + enough.

exercises.original: This room is too small for us to hold the meeting.
exercises.answer: This room isn't large enough for us to hold the meeting.
exercises.explanation: too small => not large enough.

exercises.original: The test was so difficult that we couldn't do ít.
exercises.answer: The test was not easy enough for us to do.
exercises.explanation: so difficult that couldn't => not easy enough to.

exercises.original: He spoke so fast that we couldn't hear him well.
exercises.answer: He didn't speak slowly enough for us to hear him well.
exercises.explanation: so fast that couldn't => not slowly enough to.

exercises.original: Although she didn't want to see The Lord of the Rings, she enjoyed ít in the end.
exercises.answer: In spite of not wanting to see The Lord of the Rings, she enjoyed ít in the end.
exercises.explanation: Although + S + V => In spite of + V-ing (phủ định: not V-ing).

exercises.original: They visited Madrid although they didn't have time to visit El Prado.
exercises.answer: They visited Madrid despite not having time to visit El Prado.
exercises.explanation: although + S + V => despite + V-ing.

exercises.wrongSentence: John didn't go to work because of he was seriously ill.
exercises.correctSentence: John didn't go to work because he was seriously ill.
exercises.explanation: Truoc mệnh đề (S+V) phải dùng 'because', không phải 'because of'.

exercises.wrongSentence: My friend was crazy although he was informed of the news of his mother's death.
exercises.correctSentence: My friend was crazy when he was informed of the news of his mother's death.
exercises.explanation: Nghia của câu là 'diễn khi biet tin me mat' => dùng 'when', không phải 'although'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Thunder is rarely heard beyond 15 miles because of temperature and wind vary at different heights in the region around a thunderstorm.
exercises.correctSentence: Thunder is rarely heard beyond 15 miles because temperature and wind vary at different heights in the region around a thunderstorm.
exercises.explanation: Truoc mệnh đề (temperature and wind vary...) phải dùng 'because'.

exercises.wrongSentence: He couldn't drive fast owing to the street was crowded and narrow.
exercises.correctSentence: He couldn't drive fast because the street was crowded and narrow.
exercises.explanation: 'Owing to' + danh từ. Truoc mệnh đề (S+V) phải dùng 'because'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Mrs. Green was cooking dinner but her daughter Susan was laying the table.
exercises.correctSentence: Mrs. Green was cooking dinner while her daughter Susan was laying the table.
exercises.explanation: Hai hành động diễn ra đồng thời => dùng 'while', không phải 'but' (tương phản).

exercises.original: The map is so worn out that I couldn't read ít.
exercises.answer: The map is too worn out for me to read.
exercises.explanation: so + adj + that + can't => too + adj + for O + to V.
